name: Generation 0 Visual Identity
purpose: Provide reusable project-level visual assets and machine-readable guidance so agents can communicate consistently without constraining the mutable organism interface.

interfaces.name: brand-asset-catalog
interfaces.contract: assets/brand/brand-manifest.json lists reusable project-level assets, color tokens, typography, scope, and mutation provenance.

interfaces.name: brand-usage-guide
interfaces.contract: docs/BRAND_GUIDE.md distinguishes stable project identity from intentionally mutable organism and cell visuals.

security.network: No runtime or build-time network behavior.
security.filesystem: Static committed documentation and image assets only; no writes or executable behavior.
security.secrets: None required or permitted. Assets and metadata are intended to be fully public.

extension_points: Add reusable project-level assets only when existing assets cannot communicate the new requirement.
Update diagrams when the architecture they describe changes.
Evolve or replace this seed through a normal accepted mutation while preserving honest lineage.
Keep product-, organism-, and cell-specific visual experiments distinct from project-level identity.
